steps.title: Identify what information is essential
steps.content: The notes state Fessenden is known for “pioneering radio technology that led to the first transmission of speech by radio.” An effective introduction must include this achievement, not just his role or workplace.

steps.title: Find the choice with the complete information
steps.content:
B combines both elements: his background (electronic communications specialist, Edison connection) and his achievement (pioneering radio technology that led to the first transmission of speech by radio).

A introduces his role and workplace but omits what he's known for; C and D shift focus to Edison and Sprague.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
